query:
SELECT id, document_id, original_filename, s3_url, document_type, extraction_status, mime_type
FROM ingestion_documents
WHERE id = 630001 OR document_id = '630001';

SELECT id, document_id, original_filename, s3_url, document_type, extraction_status
FROM ingestion_documents
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 10;
